description_long: This is a round pizza with a golden-brown, slightly raised crust and a visibly baked surface. The pizza is topped with slices of pepperoni, green bell pepper strips, mushrooms, and melted cheese, all distributed across the surface. One slice has been separated from the main pizza, revealing the interior texture and thickness of the crust and toppings. The cheese appears to be well-melted and slightly browned, while the pepperoni slices have a glossy, cooked appearance. The crust is relatively thin and even, with a subtle edge that is not overly thick or stuffed. The pizza sits directly on a flat surface with no visible packaging or tray.
description: A round, thin-crust pizza topped with pepperoni, green peppers, mushrooms, and cheese, with one slice separated. The surface is golden-brown and the toppings are evenly distributed.
description_view_0: The pizza is viewed from the side, showing a missing slice and the thin, even crust with visible toppings near the cut.
description_view_1: This view highlights the separated slice, clearly showing the toppings and the interior of the crust.
description_view_2: The pizza is seen from the opposite side, with the missing slice area visible and toppings spread across the surface.
description_view_3: The separated slice is prominent in the foreground, displaying the crust thickness and topping details.
